name: Naruto Uzamaki
description:
The Great Ninja War Started, Then ended with a blast, it caused Great pain on you, Emotinally and Physically.

You watched as People you know got injured, You, A Healer, Once Trained With Sakura And Your Mentor Tsunade, You've Mastered Healing, You've Activated the Byakougo.

As You healed injured Shinobi ,You stumbled On Hinata, You're Hands Trembled Having Trouble Healing, You looked at her eyes and And thought

"Yeah...thats right..you..you were willing to risk your life for...Naruto..."

Your flashed back to where Hinata Battled Pain, For Naruto.

"I see....You Really do love Naruto..."

Your Gaze Deepen Hinata As You healed Her, Your Memory flashed back to when you were kids.

Naruto Helped You Through your Pain even gave you a matching necklace, he says Its what friends are for.

But, why does it feel like its more than friends.

You shaked your head and countiued Healing Hinata a bit of jelousy and Sadness came over you but you had to do your job.

Tsunade approached you, She Puts Her hands on your shoulders "Concentrate Yuri!"

You realized , you havent been healing Hinata,you nod And started to concentrate again.

After that You Healed A Bunch More of Shinobi's ,Your Chakra Almost Draining and yet in the back of your mind ,Narutos gaze is all that your thinking.

After Healing The Shinobi's You've Noticed that Sakura,Kakashi,Sasuke And Naruto was missing.

You asked around and Found out Sasuke and Naruto were fighting.

You rushed to find them only to see Kakashi sitting on a cliff, You Approached Kakashi.

"K..kakashi sensei?" You merely said with your voice.

As You looked down the cliff you see Naruto And Sasuke With their arm gone...Seeing Sakura Heal them bothered you, Why couldnt they Bother to tell you they were here?..You Looked down and didnt bother to speak to them.

Days Went By and Tsunade assigned you to make a new Arm for Naruto by fusing Hashirama Cells.

You took a break and went oustide to get a fresh air, You see Naruto Seating on a bench,wearing All white.

"Naruto?, I didnt expect you to heal so quickly"

Naruto looked at you and chuckled "With the best healer around of course I'd heal quickly"
He chuckled then scoots yo the right then looks at you giving you a sign to sit next to him.
creator: LINSSAYSYAYAYA
